title: UU-Matter Extended
body: # UU-Matter Extended Ever thought UU-Matter was way too lame? Neither did I. UU-Matter Extended adds new recipes for the following mods: - Vanilla Minecraft (slimeball, wool, blaze rods, ...) - [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) (ostrum ore and deepslate variant, ...) - [Applied Energistics 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/ae2) (certus quartz, ...) --- (mojang and grable stolen from [parachute](https://github.com/n2pm/parachute), sue me.)
